result.vlm_summary:
page_state:
Amazon product detail page for a ring light; search bar shows “16-inch ring light,” but the visible product is a different item.
task_relevant_visible_text:
“Aureday 14" Selfie Ring Light with 62" Tripod Stand and Phone Holder…”
“Dimmable LED”
“4.4”
“(14,056)”
“Prime Member Price $31.99”
“Phone Holder”
“16-inch ring light” (search bar)
selected_candidate:
Aureday 14" Selfie Ring Light with 62" Tripod Stand and Phone Holder
constraint_evidence:
- ring light: supported (product title and image show ring light)
- 16-inch size: contradicted (visible title says 14")
- adjustable brightness: supported (title includes “Dimmable LED”)
- phone holder: supported (title includes “Phone Holder”)
- under $40: supported (visible price $31.99)
- Amazon product result/detail page: supported (URL/title and product layout)
action_target:
Send message to user: “[EXIT]”
success_signals:
Visible product matches most constraints except size; price is under budget and phone holder/brightness are present.
failure_signals:
Size mismatch: 14" instead of required 16". This is a product detail page, not a confirmed 16-inch item.
uncertainty:
Could be additional variants or related results not visible; only one product detail page is shown, so no confirmation of a true 16-inch option.

task_context.task: navigate: Find a 16-inch ring light on Amazon with adjustable brightness and a phone holder, under $40.
task_context.title: Amazon.com. Spend less. Smile more.

args.query: Amazon product detail page selected item mismatches required size: 14 inch ring light shown when task asks for 16-inch ring light under $40 with phone holder and adjustable brightness
wrong_result on ecommerce product detail page where selected ring light has wrong size (14 inch instead of 16 inch) but matches brightness, phone holder, and price

items.summary: The agent returned a plausible result that missed qualifiers in the user's request.
items.fix_hint: Extract qualifiers such as recency, thresholds, or category before evaluating candidate results.

items.summary: The agent operated on the wrong target — wrong entity, wrong location, wrong category, or wrong page type — instead of the user's intended object.
items.fix_hint: Verify that the active page or selected entity matches the user's stated target before acting; recognize when the current context does not match and reorient.

args.expected_behavior: The agent should have confirmed a 16-inch ring light that also has adjustable brightness, a phone holder, and costs under $40 before stopping or reporting success.
args.actual_behavior: The trajectory ended on an Amazon product detail page for an Aureday 14-inch selfie ring light with phone holder and dimmable LED, priced at $31.99, which matches several constraints but contradicts the required 16-inch size.
args.regression_rule: When the task includes a hard size/variant constraint, do not treat a near-match as success; verify the exact size on the final product page or continue searching for a true 16-inch option.

evidence.claim: Task required a 16-inch ring light with adjustable brightness and a phone holder, under $40.
The final visible product on the page was "Aureday 14\" Selfie Ring Light with 62\" Tripod Stand and Phone Holder".
High-detail step evidence marked 16-inch size as contradicted and identified the selected candidate as a 14-inch ring light.
The visible price was $31.99 and the page also showed "Dimmable LED" and "Phone Holder", so most but not all constraints were satisfied.
The run’s search sequence only reached a single product detail page before exiting, without evidence of confirming a true 16-inch variant.

suggested_followups.label: Find 16-inch options
suggested_followups.message: Search Amazon specifically for ring lights labeled 16-inch, then filter by price under $40.
